results.name: 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT (lines 687-722)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
Calls: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST
results.summary: paragraph 9000-READ-ACCT, 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID.... invokes: PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT, PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT, PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST.
results.content:
9000-READ-ACCT.                                                          
                                                                                
           SET  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE  TO TRUE
           
           MOVE CDEMO-ACCT-ID TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID                            
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT                                      
              THRU 9200-GETCARDXREF-BYACCT-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
      *    IF DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-CARDXREF                                     
           IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                             
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT                                      
              THRU 9300-GETACCTDATA-BYACCT-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
           IF DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-ACCTDAT                                      
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE CDEMO-CUST-ID TO WS-CARD-RID-CUST-ID                            
                                                                                
           PERFORM 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST                                      
              THRU 9400-GETCUSTDATA-BYCUST-EXIT                                 
                                                                                
           IF DID-NOT-FIND-CUST-IN-CUSTDAT                                      
              GO TO 9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT                                         
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
                                                                                
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       9000-READ-ACCT-EXIT.                                                     
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
results.preamble:
File: COUSR03C.cbl
Program: COUSR03C - CICS COBOL Program - Delete a user from USRSEC file
Paragraph: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY (lines 142-173)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR03, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph PROCESS-ENTER-KEY in COUSR03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR03, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.

           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SPACES      TO FNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   LNAMEI   OF COUSR3AI
                                   USRTYPEI OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE SEC-USR-FNAME      TO FNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-LNAME      TO LNAMEI    OF COUSR3AI
               MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE       TO USRTYPEI  OF COUSR3AI
               PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      DELETE-USER-INFO
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: READ-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR03C.cbl
Program: COUSR03C - CICS COBOL Program - Delete a user from USRSEC file
Paragraph: READ-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 267-304)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR03, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR03, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                INTO      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (SEC-USR-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF SEC-USR-ID)
                UPDATE
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   CONTINUE
                   MOVE 'Press PF5 key to delete this user ...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHNEUTR       TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to lookup User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: DELETE-USER-INFO
results.preamble:
File: COUSR03C.cbl
Program: COUSR03C - CICS COBOL Program - Delete a user from USRSEC file
Paragraph: DELETE-USER-INFO (lines 174-196)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR03, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph DELETE-USER-INFO in COUSR03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR03, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
DELETE-USER-INFO.

           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USRIDINI OF COUSR3AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID can NOT be empty...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE

           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               MOVE USRIDINI  OF COUSR3AI TO SEC-USR-ID
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
               PERFORM DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      RETURN-TO-PREV-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COACTVWC.cbl
Program: COACTVWC - Business logic - Accept and process Account View request
Paragraph: 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT (lines 541-576)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COACTVW, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS, 1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT in COACTVWC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS.                                                 
      *    PROTECT OR UNPROTECT BASED ON CONTEXT                                
           MOVE DFHBMFSE               TO ACCTSIDA OF CACTVWAI                  
                                                                                
      *    POSITION CURSOR                                                      
           EVALUATE TRUE                                                        
              WHEN FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                        
              WHEN FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                         
                   MOVE -1             TO ACCTSIDL OF CACTVWAI                  
              WHEN OTHER                                                        
                   MOVE -1             TO ACCTSIDL OF CACTVWAI                  
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
                                                                                
      *    SETUP COLOR                                                          
           MOVE DFHDFCOL               TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
                                                                                
           IF FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                                             
              MOVE DFHRED              TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  FLG-ACCTFILTER-BLANK                                             
           AND CDEMO-PGM-REENTER                                                
               MOVE '*'                TO ACCTSIDO OF CACTVWAO                  
               MOVE DFHRED             TO ACCTSIDC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           IF  WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                               
               MOVE DFHBMDAR           TO INFOMSGC OF CACTVWAO                  
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE DFHNEUTR           TO INFOMSGC OF CACTVWAO                  
           END-IF                                                               
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1300-SETUP-SCREEN-ATTRS-EXIT.                                            
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: STEP05
6000-DELETE-AUTH-SUMMARY, 6000-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: CBPAUP0C.cbl
Program: CBPAUP0C - BATCH COBOL IMS Program - Delete Expired Pending Authoriation Messages
Paragraph: 6000-DELETE-AUTH-SUMMARY, 6000-EXIT (lines 328-351)
References: COPY CIPAUSMY, COPY CIPAUDTY
Calls: PERFORM 9999-ABEND
results.summary: paragraph 6000-DELETE-AUTH-SUMMARY, 6000-EXIT in CBPAUP0C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CIPAUSMY, CIPAUDTY. invokes: PERFORM 9999-ABEND. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
6000-DELETE-AUTH-SUMMARY.
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *
            IF DEBUG-ON
               DISPLAY 'DEBUG: AUTH SMRY DLET : ' PA-ACCT-ID
            END-IF

            EXEC DLI DLET USING PCB(PAUT-PCB-NUM)
                 SEGMENT (PAUTSUM0)
                 FROM (PENDING-AUTH-SUMMARY)
            END-EXEC

            IF DIBSTAT = SPACES
               ADD 1                     TO WS-NO-SUMRY-DELETED
            ELSE
               DISPLAY 'AUTH SUMMARY DELETE FAILED :' DIBSTAT
               DISPLAY 'AUTH APP ID                :' PA-ACCT-ID
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND
            END-IF
            .
       6000-EXIT.
            EXIT.
      *
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COUSR03C.cbl
Program: COUSR03C - CICS COBOL Program - Delete a user from USRSEC file
Paragraph: DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 305-340)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COUSR03, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE in COUSR03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COUSR03, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS, PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
DELETE-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS DELETE
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)
                   PERFORM INITIALIZE-ALL-FIELDS
                   MOVE SPACES             TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE DFHGREEN           TO ERRMSGC  OF COUSR3AO
                   STRING 'User '     DELIMITED BY SIZE
                          SEC-USR-ID  DELIMITED BY SPACE
                          ' has been deleted ...' DELIMITED BY SIZE
                     INTO WS-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User ID NOT found...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USRIDINL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'RESP:' WS-RESP-CD 'REAS:' WS-REAS-CD
                   MOVE 'Y'     TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to Update User...' TO
                                   WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO FNAMEL OF COUSR3AI
                   PERFORM SEND-USRDEL-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      CLEAR-CURRENT-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
